subcodes.first_line: The fragrance of the All-Merciful's garment is wafted abroad, and the spring-rain of divine bounty is flowing and diffusing. O friends, strive with your souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عرف قمیص رحمانی متضوع و نیسان رحمت ربانی جاری و ساری ای دوستان بجان سعی
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @attaining the life of the spirit, @living waters; water of life, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
